しれーかんさま、お仕事お疲れ様です～。<br>あの……こないだ言ってた新しいお菓:
Commander. Thank you for your hard work! Um, the new sweet Mil
mentioned the other day, it's finally done!
大穴で見つけた木の実の“ほろ苦さ”とマーケットで見つけた果実の“甘さ”。<br>:
The bitter nut Mil found in the Abyss and the sweet fruit Mil found in
the Market... It was hard to balance them, but Mil's happy with how it turned out!♪
これは『バームクーヘン』っていうお菓子です～。<br>一層ずつ、木の年輪みたいに:
This sweet is called Baumkuchen. You bake it layer by layer, carefully
building it up like tree rings.
甘くて、時々ほろ苦くて……しれーかんさまと過ごしてきた毎日が、<br>こうやって:
Sweet and sometimes bitter... The days Mil's spent with Commander
stack up like these tree rings... Mil made it with that image in mind.
ミルは、このお菓子みたいに、しれーかんさまとのたくさんの思い出を、<br>これか:
Mil thinks it would be nice if we could keep baking layers of memories
together with Commander from now on... That's what Mil thinks...
